summary: The scaffold records were ported from existing lev-tracker records and preserve PMID, DOI, source title, study linkage, and the preclinical boundary. This review is nonblocking because it validates scaffold structure, not a fresh source-level re-extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: The scaffold source-fidelity review is not a full re-review of the original paper.
findings.why_it_matters: The first real senolytics coverage-repair pass should verify the source directly before using the record as production evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Run source-fidelity and extraction-fidelity review during the first real coverage-repair pass.
